passedAssertions.summary: All 4 mapj_cli skills evaluated (mapj: 70/100, mapj-confluence-export: 71/100, mapj-protheus-query: 75/100, mapj-tdn-search: 70/100) with structured scoring across Discovery Layer (40pts), Execution Layer (50pts), and Anti-patrones (10pts). Gaps identified: missing Role (4/4), missing Success Criteria (4/4), tags vs keywords (4/4).

Specific recommendations provided for each skill with concrete actions: Role section (all 4), Examples few-shot (all 4), Success Criteria (all 4), keywords migration (all 4), Limitations (mapj-tdn-search only). Includes implementation examples with code snippets and diff showing before/after.

Each recommendation backed by specific sources: Role section → Anthropic Engineering 'Building Effective AI Agents' (2025), 2-5 Examples → arXiv:2407.12994, Success Criteria → Microsoft Learn, keywords → Agent Skills Standard (agentskills.io), Limitations → Claude docs.

Recommendations are specific to mapj_cli context: Go CLI with TOTVS skills, includes actual skill names (mapj, mapj-confluence-export, mapj-protheus-query, mapj-tdn-search), references actual file paths (skills/*/SKILL.md), includes TOTVS-specific content (Protheus, TDN, Confluence, ADVPL).

notes: Documentation mission - no services started. Validation performed by reading produced documents and verifying they meet validation contract requirements.
